headline: How The Peloton (PTON) Investment Story Is Resetting As Analysts Rework Their Assumptions
summary: Peloton Interactive’s fair value estimate was adjusted slightly, with the price target moving from US$8.08 to US$7.88 per share. This tweak comes as recent research cuts across the Street, including reductions of US$1.50, US$2, US$3, US$3.25, and US$5.50 from various firms. These changes reflect a broad reset of expectations around what kind of revenue and earnings path analysts are comfortable modeling today. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifts so you can stay on top of...
